# Experiment Matrix

- exp-001 [planned] A frozen feature-level tri-modal reliability-budget surface reveals a degraded-tight decision gap: feasible oracle beats the best single-axis policy by >=3 macro-F1 points and >=1.5x pooled SE within 60 GPU-hours after data preparation on ntu-gpu43.
